title: Rule-Async-QueueProcessor
description: JSON schema for creating or updating a Pega Queue Processor rule (Rule-Async-QueueProcessor). Only authored and identity fields are included; system-managed and read-only fields are omitted.

pyLabel.description: Human-readable display label shown in rule lists.

pyRuleName.description: Internal rule name. Server-derived from pyPurpose — do not set directly.

pyPurpose.description: Rule identifier and class key; unique, case-insensitive. Ask the user for the rule name and use it here. The server uses this to populate pyRuleName.

pyBaseClass.description: Applies-to class for the Queue Processor. Must match the class of the activity referenced by pyActivityName — do not default to '@baseclass'.

pyRuleSet.description: Ruleset name the rule is saved into.

pyActivityName.description: Name of the activity to execute for each dequeued message. Required to save the rule.

pyNodeTypes.description: Map of node type keys to node type objects. At least one entry required. Use 'BackgroundProcessing' for standard background nodes. Never use node IDs.

pyNodeTypesText.description: Node-type label required by the server. Builder auto-fills 'BackgroundProcessing'.

pyProcessingMode.description: 'Immediate' dispatches messages as fast as possible. 'Delayed' defers by a duration stored in a property on the work object.

pyMaxThreads.description: Maximum concurrent processing threads. Must be ≤ Kafka partition count. Resets to 1 when Auto-Tune is enabled. String-encoded integer.

pyIsAutoTuneEnabled.description: Enable Auto-Tune. Dynamically adjusts thread count based on Kafka lag and average processing time. Pega Infinity 26 default is 'true' — builder auto-fills this if not supplied. Do not also set pyMaxThreads > 1 when enabled.

pyMaxAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts before a message moves to the broken queue. String-encoded integer.

pyInitialInterval.description: Wait time in minutes before the 2nd attempt. String-encoded integer.

pyIntervalFactor.description: Exponential backoff multiplier applied per retry. String-encoded decimal, e.g. '2.0'.

pyMaxReadyToProcessStateMessages.description: Messages fetched per poll cycle. Default 2000. Increase for high-volume inbound topics.

pyLongRunningInterruptThreshold.description: Hard interrupt threshold in milliseconds. Builder auto-fills '900000' (15 minutes). Server validates this unconditionally regardless of pyIsAlertThresholdManuallyEnabled. Activity is forcibly interrupted when exceeded.

pyLongRunningThreshold.description: Warning threshold in milliseconds. When pyIsAlertThresholdManuallyEnabled is 'true', include this field explicitly. A typical manual value is '2000'. Raises PEGA0117 when exceeded without interrupting the activity.

pyIsAlertThresholdManuallyEnabled.description: Toggle between manual and baseline-derived alerting thresholds. When set to 'true', both pyLongRunningThreshold and pyLongRunningInterruptThreshold are mandatory.

pyIsEnabled.description: Set 'false' to disable the QP without deleting it.
